name: ysbzs-optimization-round5
description: 元素背包史：单机存档、AP真实消耗、事件投影、机制门禁与服务器权威入口。

scripts.test: node tests/run_all_tests.cjs && npm run test:unit && npm run test:ui && npm run test:full && npm run test:ops && npm run test:prediction
scripts.check:all: npm test && npm run check:architecture && npm run check:csv && npm run check:day7 && npm run check:dom && npm run check:ui-connected && npm run check:jsdoc
scripts.test:coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/unit/*.test.cjs tests/full_coverage.test.cjs tests/ui_adapter.test.cjs tests/csv_source.test.cjs tests/day7_fire_trial.test.cjs tests/full_player_operations.test.cjs tests/prediction_authority.test.cjs
scripts.check:v1: npm test && npm run check:csv && npm run check:day7 && npm run check:dom
scripts.test:coverage:legacy: echo "legacy 127-data coverage test moved to tests/legacy_full_coverage_127_20260608.test.cjs.disabled; use test:coverage for current 30-pet build"
scripts.check:all:browser: npm run check:all && npm run check:browser
scripts.check:jsdoc: npx --yes --package typescript tsc --allowJs --checkJs --noEmit --skipLibCheck --strict false --noImplicitAny false --module commonjs --target es2022 src/core/battle/position.cjs src/core/battle/actions.cjs src/core/battle/preview.cjs src/core/battle/planning.cjs
